description: The Secret Intelligence Service (SIS), commonly known as MI6, is the foreign intelligence service of the United Kingdom. MI6 was a co-architect of the [1953 Iranian coup d'état](/events/iranian-coup-1953), planning Operation Boot alongside the CIA's Operation Ajax to overthrow Prime Minister Mohammad Mossadegh. British involvement was primarily motivated by the nationalisation of the [Anglo-Iranian Oil Company](/orgs/anglo-iranian-oil-company) in 1951, which threatened substantial British economic and strategic interests. The British government's role in the coup was formally acknowledged in 2013.
editorial_notes: Operation Boot = UK codename for 1953 coup. MI6 initiated contact with CIA after UK was expelled from Iran in 1952. Motivated chiefly by AIOC oil interests.
